provenance.source_corpus: Effect of Flea Beetles (Aphthona Nigriscutis) on Prairie Invaded by Leafy Spurge (Euphorbia Esula) in Maintoba

source_spans.text: Aphthona nigriscutis, the black dot flea beetle, was released as a biological control agent in nine heavily infested sites in south-central Manitoba
Leafy spurge near the release points showed significantly lower cover
Leafy spurge near the release points showed significantly lower... biomass
Leafy spurge near the release points showed significantly lower... height
Leafy spurge near the release points showed significantly lower... stem density
release points had significantly more bare ground
release points had significantly more... higher grass and sedge biomass
release points had significantly more... greater plant diversity
perennial grasses and sedges, increased in frequency
frequency of leafy spurge did not change over time

edges.original_sentence: Leafy spurge near the release points showed significantly lower cover, biomass, height, and stem density than at the reference points.
